diagnoses.title: caveman-review 在 3 个运行时中是内容一致的镜像
diagnoses.titleEn: caveman-review is a content-identical mirror across 3 runtimes
diagnoses.detail: 物理安装不同，但标准化内容 hash 一致，且分别绑定到不同运行时；这只证明镜像关系，不证明实际加载。
diagnoses.detailEn: The physical installations differ, but their normalized hashes match and they are bound to different runtimes. This proves a mirror relationship, not actual loading.
diagnoses.action: 无需合并或删除；仅在维护成本成为问题时再评估来源。
diagnoses.actionEn: Do not merge or delete them automatically; revisit only if maintenance cost becomes material.
